title: Which Jack Nicholson Character Lives Inside You?
dek: Eight roles, eight completely different flavors of chaos — answer honestly and we'll tell you which unforgettable Nicholson performance matches your soul.

quiz.intro: No wrong answers here — just pick whatever your gut reaches for first.

questions.question: Someone in charge tells you to calm down. Your instinct is to:

answers.text: Redecorate the whole situation with pure menace and a grin
Smirk and do the opposite of whatever they just said
Laugh in their face — literally, maniacally
Remind them who actually runs this town
Sneaking a boat out with a bunch of people I just met
Crashing a party I definitely wasn't invited to, uninvited grin included
Holding court at my usual bar table like I own the place
Dinner at 'my' restaurant, same table, same order, no exceptions

questions.question: How do you handle rules you disagree with?

answers.text: Ignore them — I make my own rules and burn the rulebook
Rewrite them to serve my own agenda entirely
Follow them extremely precisely, then judge everyone who doesn't
Justify breaking them because someone has to make the hard calls

questions.question: Someone underestimates you. What happens next?

answers.text: I let them keep thinking that — right up until it's too late
I list, out loud, every reason they're wrong about me
I deliver a monologue they'll never forget
I say something brutally honest that somehow lands as charming
Backhanded compliments that somehow still land
Telling you exactly what you don't want to hear, for your own good
Showing up uninvited and completely charming my way in
Following the mystery until I find out who's really lying to me

questions.question: Your worst quality, if you're being honest:

answers.text: I think the ends always justify the means
I get bored the second things get too comfortable
I trust absolutely no one until I've seen the paperwork myself
I explode when I feel cornered

questions.question: Pick a workplace disaster you'd cause:

answers.text: Flirting with someone I absolutely should not be flirting with
Uncovering a scandal nobody wanted uncovered
Losing my mind slowly over a long, isolated project
Starting an uprising against management within a week

questions.question: How do you take a compliment?

answers.text: Suspiciously — what does this person actually want from me?
With a grin that's a little unsettling
By turning it into a rallying cry for the whole room
I don't — I make it about my own greatness instead

questions.question: Your ideal final act of the story:

answers.text: Chasing my target through a hedge maze forever, honestly
Going out defiant, on my own terms, no matter the cost
A grand, theatrical exit with a punchline attached
A twist that reveals I was the villain all along

results.name: Jack Torrance
results.subtitle: The Shining (1980)
results.description: You don't do slow burns — you do full-blown eruptions. Isolation, pressure, and an axe are basically your love language, and everyone around you can feel the storm coming from a mile away.

results.name: Randle McMurphy
results.subtitle: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest (1975)
results.description: You're the friend who turns any dull, oppressive situation into a full-blown rebellion. You can't help stirring things up — and honestly, everyone around you is better and freer for it, even if it costs you everything.

results.name: The Joker
results.subtitle: Batman (1989)
results.description: You bring genuine, gleeful menace to everything you touch. You're not here to blend in — you're here to steal the whole scene, cackle about it, and let everyone else deal with the aftermath.

results.name: Frank Costello
results.subtitle: The Departed (2006)
results.description: You're the person everyone's quietly a little afraid of, in the best and worst ways. You keep your circle close, your motives closer, and you're always three moves ahead of everyone in the room.

results.name: Melvin Udall
results.subtitle: As Good As It Gets (1997)
results.description: You're prickly, particular, and allergic to your own softness — but underneath the rudeness is someone who's actually capable of real, hard-won growth. You just need the right person to bring it out of you.

results.name: Colonel Nathan Jessup
results.subtitle: A Few Good Men (1992)
results.description: You believe in the mission so completely that you'll justify almost anything to protect it. You're commanding, unshakable, and absolutely convinced everyone else is too soft to handle what you know.

results.name: Garrett Breedlove
results.subtitle: Terms of Endearment (1983)
results.description: Charming, a little reckless, and allergic to commitment, you talk a big game right up until things get real — and then you get cold feet and bolt. But when you do let someone in, it changes everything.

results.name: J.J. Gittes
results.subtitle: Chinatown (1974)
results.description: You're the one who keeps digging long after everyone else has given up, convinced you can outsmart a rigged system. You rarely win clean — but you never stop looking for the truth anyway.
